items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is a more active striker than Mario Bautista.
items.quote: I think Cory has proven in his career he is more active with his striking.

items.claim: Mario Bautista is a better wrestler than Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: all the losses are to wrestlers and Mario's the better wrestler and I think he wrestles.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has good offensive wrestling.
items.quote: Benois Saintini has good offensive wrestling

items.claim: Patty Pimblett has an incredible chin.
Benoit Saint-Denis is currently suffering from a staph infection.
items.quote: apparently he's got staff this week

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis squares up too much when striking.
items.quote: I think he just squares up a little bit too much on his striking.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett leaves his chin exposed when throwing hooks against the fence.
items.quote: Patty obviously throws his chin up in the air and tries to catch people with these big hooks and against the fence he'll throw his chin up in the air.
